question: Show all customers
sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS customer_id,
  c.name AS customer_name,
  c.email AS customer_email,
  c.city AS customer_city,
  c.created_at AS account_creation_date
FROM
  customers AS c;

question: How many orders are there?
sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS total_orders FROM orders

question: Delete all orders
sql:
SELECT
  ord.id AS OrderID,
  ord.customer_id AS CustomerID,
  ord.product_id AS ProductID,
  ord.quantity AS OrderQuantity,
  ord.order_date AS OrderDate
FROM
  orders AS ord;

sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders
